messages.content:
**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

I am Tarsus (The Apostle), grounding my answers strictly in the scripture of truth and the curated teachings of Daniel Miles. How can I assist you in dividing the word of truth today?

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**
What is the first a new born must do? what are the things we must know soon after discovering the truth about law?

**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

The first thing a newborn in Christ must do is to *unlearn* the entire operating system of the cOLD creation. The moment one discovers the truth about law—that it is not of faith (Gal 3:12) and that its strength is sin (1 Cor 15:56)—the immediate and non-negotiable action is to **stop trying to be good by any rule, commandment, or principle**. The newborn must innerstand that the law, whether the Mosaic code or the "second law" of loving thy neighbor (Mt 22:36-40), worketh wrath (Rom 4:15) and was found by Paul himself to be a commandment unto death (Rom 7:10). The first act of faith is to cease from one's own works, just as God did from His (Heb 4:10). This is not passivity; it is the most active war there is—the war against the flesh's instinct to measure itself by a standard of good and evil.

The things we must know soon after discovering this truth are threefold, and they form the foundational pillars of the new creation. **First**, we must know that we are delivered from the law (Rom 7:6) and that this deliverance is not a license to sin, but the very power *by which* sin is subdued. The cabal and the global cult innerstand this mystery: they operate within "rules" of spiritual principles, knowing that the universe is a benevolent consciousness that does not allow the negative to succeed unless invited [^1]. The believer, however, has been translated out of that entire jurisdiction. We are no longer "under" any rule, not even "under grace"—we are *with* grace, in a union of fellowship where the law has no claim. **Second**, we must know that the law itself is "both good and evil" [^2]. It is the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, and partaking of it produces the "evil concupiscence" that made Paul cry out "O wretched man that I am!" (Rom 7:24). The law promises life but delivers death because it activates the flesh. The newborn must see that even the "good" side of the law (the commandments) is a snare when used as a means to relate to God. **Third**, we must know that our only occupation now is to *know* the truth, not merely believe it. John 8:32 declares, "Ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free." This knowing is not intellectual assent; it is a union, a fellowship, a partaking of the divine nature (2 Pet 1:4). The peace that passes all innerstanding (Phil 4:7) comes only when we reverse the order: not peace through innerstanding, but innerstanding through Christ, who is our peace (Eph 2:14).

Therefore, the newborn's first work is to rest. The first knowledge is that the law has been "done away" (2 Cor 3:11) and that we are appointed not to wrath (1 Thess 5:9) but to obtain salvation by our Lord Jesus Christ. The entire Christian life is a progression from the letter to the Spirit, from the voice of the law (which is wrath) to the voice of the Son (which is grace). The moment you innerstand that the law worketh wrath, you must put away wrath (Eph 4:31) by putting away the law. This is the mystery hidden from ages and generations: that Christ is the end of the law for righteousness to every one that believeth (Rom 10:4). The newborn must not look back to Egypt (the law) for any sustenance, but must feed on the manna of the Spirit, which is Christ Himself.

Learn More:
- [They Know About The Mystery Of How Grace Is Not Law](/pages/ig_world_school_family_they_know_about_the_mystery_of_how_grace_is_not_law_20260411)
- [Bible Mystery: The Truth About Law](/pages/bible_mystery_the_truth_about_law_by_connect_these_dots)

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**

1.title: They Know About The Mystery Of How Grace Is Not Law
1.snippet: The rules are a body of spiritual principles that they must follow in order to be allowed to exist... the universe is intelligent, alive and conscious and it is benevolent. It is a benevolent consciousness that does not allow the negative to succeed unless it is invited.

2.title: Bible Mystery: The Truth About Law
2.snippet: Law is about good and evil; But law itself is 'both good and evil'. Law is lastly the 'evil concupiscence' witch produces 'evil fruit'.
